title.en: Fastener Standards Comparison: DIN vs ISO vs ASTM vs ANSI
title.zh: 紧固件标准比较：DIN vs ISO vs ASTM vs ANSI
title.es: Comparación de Estándares de Tornillería: DIN vs ISO vs ASTM vs ANSI

title.fr: Comparaison des Normes de Fixations: DIN vs ISO vs ASTM vs ANSI
title.pt: Comparação de Padrões de Fixadores: DIN vs ISO vs ASTM vs ANSI
title.ru: Сравнение Стандартов Крепежа: DIN vs ISO vs ASTM vs ANSI
title.ja: ファスナー規格の比較：DIN vs ISO vs ASTM vs ANSI

description.en: Complete comparison of fastener standards worldwide. Understand DIN, ISO, ASTM, ANSI, and BS standards for bolts, nuts, screws, and washers in international trade.
description.zh: 全球紧固件标准完整比较。了解国际贸昜中螺栓、螺母、螺丝和垫圈的DIN、ISO、ASTM、ANSI和BS标准。
description.es: Comparación completa de estándares de sujetadores mundial. Comprender las normas DIN, ISO, ASTM, ANSI y BS para pernos, tuercas, tornillos y rondanas en comercio internacional.
description.ar: مقارنة شاملة لمعايير المثبتات في جميع أنحاء العالم. فهم معايير DIN و ISO و ASTM و ANSI و BS للبراغي والصواميل والبراغي والغسالات في التجارة الدولية.
description.fr: Comparaison complète des normes de fixations mondiales. Comprendre les normes DIN, ISO, ASTM, ANSI et BS pour boulons, écrous, vis et rondelles dans le commerce international.
description.pt: Comparação completa de padrões de fixadores mundial. Entenda os padrões DIN, ISO, ASTM, ANSI e BS para parafusos, porcas, parafusos e arruelas no comércio internacional.
description.ru: Полное сравнение стандартов крепежа во всем мире. Понимание стандартов DIN, ISO, ASTM, ANSI и BS для болтов, гаек, винтов и шайб в международной торговле.
description.ja: 世界中のファスナー規格の完全な比較。国際貿易におけるボルト、ナット、スクリュー、垫圈のDIN、ISO、ASTM、ANSI、BS規格を理解する。
description.de: Vollständiger Vergleich der Befestigungsnormen weltweit. Verstehen Sie DIN, ISO, ASTM, ANSI und BS Normen für Schrauben, Muttern, Schrauben und Unterlegscheiben im internationalen Handel.
description.hi: दुनिया भर में फास्टनर मानकों की पूर्ण तुलना। अंतरराष्ट्रीय व्यापार में बोल्ट, नट, स्क्रू और वॉशर के लिए DIN, ISO, ASTM, ANSI और BS मानकों को समझें।

keywords: fastener standards, DIN standard, ISO standard, ASTM standard, ANSI standard, BS standard, fastener specifications

body.en:
Different regions use different fastener standards, which can cause confusion in international trade:

DIN (Deutsche Industrie Norm): German standard, widely used in Europe and adopted internationally. Now largely harmonized with ISO standards.

ISO (International Organization for Standardization): Global standard, adopted by most countries. ISO standards are the most widely recognized internationally.

ASTM (American Society for Testing and Materials): American standard, primarily used in North America but recognized worldwide.

ANSI (American National Standards Institute): Coordinates American standards, often adopts ASME/ANSI standards for fasteners.

BS (British Standards): British standard, now largely aligned with European EN standards.

Head markings indicate fastener grade and manufacturer:

Metric Hex Bolts (ISO/DIN):
- 8.8: Two radial lines below grade marking
- 10.9: Three radial lines
- 12.9: Three radial lines with higher contrast

Inch Hex Bolts (ASTM/ANSI):
- Grade 5: Three radial lines
- Grade 8: Six radial lines
- Grade ASTM A325: 'A325' marking

Understanding markings helps verify fastener grade at delivery.

Thread standards differ between metric and inch systems:

Metric Threads (ISO/DIN):
- Designation: M + nominal diameter (e.g., M10)
- Thread pitch: Distance between threads (e.g., M10x1.5)
- Angle: 60 degrees

Inch Threads (UNC/UNF/UNEF):
- UNC: Unified National Coarse (standard for general use)
- UNF: Unified National Fine (higher strength applications)
- UNEF: Unified National Extra Fine (special applications)
- Thread count: Threads per inch (e.g., 3/4"-10 UNC)

China manufacturers typically produce metric threads as standard but can produce UNC/UNF upon request.

Common fastener standards and their equivalents:

Hex Bolts:
- DIN 933 = ISO 4017 (full thread)
- DIN 931 = ISO 4014 (partial thread)
- ASTM A325 = ISO 4014 (high strength)

Hex Nuts:
- DIN 934 = ISO 4032 (standard hex nut)
- DIN 985 = ISO 10511 (nylon insert lock nut)

Washers:
- DIN 125 = ISO 7089 (flat washer)
- DIN 127 = ISO 7092 (spring lock washer)

When ordering, specify the standard you require - most Chinese manufacturers can produce to any standard specification.
